examples: Still, it can't be ruled out that some unmeasured factor played a role.
Fourth, residual confounding by SES or other unmeasured factors might be a concern.
This raises the possibility that, as yet, unmeasured psychological factors need to be considered.
Suppose for the sake of argument that the output of these intermediate suppliers had increased in unmeasured ways.
So long as you can count final goods, unmeasured improvements in the supply of intermediate services will succeed in raising measured productivity.
